# BROAD Air Conditioning India Pvt. Ltd.

**Website:** https://www.broadindia.com/
**Headquarters:** 908 Luxuria Trade Hub, Surat 395007, India

## About Us
BROAD India delivers cutting-edge Vapor Absorption Machines (VAM) and non-electric HVAC solutions. We provide sustainable cooling for Indian industries using waste heat, steam, hot water, oil, and natural gas, reducing electricity consumption and carbon footprint. With over two decades of experience, we are India's top supplier of absorption chillers, CCHP systems, and fuel gas recovery chillers.

## Priority Products & URLs
- Vapor Absorption Chillers: https://www.broadindia.com/vapour-absorption-chiller
- CCHP Systems: https://www.broadindia.com/cchp-systems
- Absorption Heat Pumps: https://www.broadindia.com/absorption-heat-pump
- About BROAD Group: https://www.broadindia.com/broad-group
- Latest Articles & News: https://www.broadindia.com/blogs

## Contact
